coreInterests.title: Measurement-based Quantum Computing
coreInterests.description: Continuous monitoring and real-time feedback for quantum state preparation and error suppression on realistic noisy hardware.

coreInterests.title: Geometric Quantum Optimization
coreInterests.description: Control protocols exploiting geometric optimization on quantum state manifolds, with applications to quantum chemistry and fault-tolerant computation.

coreInterests.title: Quantum Annealing & Complexity
coreInterests.description: Analysis of adiabatic quantum annealing, computational complexity, and design of control strategies for ground-state preparation on near-term devices.

coreInterests.title: Stochastic Thermodynamics
coreInterests.description: Resource estimation for quantum computing and energy–information tradeoffs in controlled open quantum systems.

fusionPassions.title: Why adiabatic quantum annealing is unlikely to yield speed-up

fusionPassions.title: On ab initio-based, free and closed-form expressions for gravitational waves
fusionPassions.description: M. Tiglio, A. Villanueva — Scientific Reports 11, 5832 (2021)

fusionPassions.title: Reduced order and surrogate models for gravitational waves
fusionPassions.description: M. Tiglio, A. Villanueva — arXiv:2101.11608, Living Reviews in Relativity (2021)
